hook.say: Jodie Foster says AI is ALREADY making major Hollywood films.
hook.show: Jodie Foster says AI is ALREADY making major Hollywood films.

lines.say: The Oscar winner points to the Brad Pitt racing drama 'F1' as an example.
lines.show: The Oscar winner points to the Brad Pitt racing drama 'F1' as an example.

lines.say: She describes its structure as "exactly what you'd learn in school."
lines.show: She describes its structure as "exactly what you'd learn in school."
emphasis: exactly what you'd learn in school

lines.say: Actors deliver lines "exactly the way it would be written if a computer was writing."
lines.show: Actors deliver lines "exactly the way it would be written if a computer was writing."
emphasis: exactly the way it would be written if a computer was writing

lines.say: Foster says filmmakers can "dominate the technology to make something big and beautiful."
lines.show: Foster says filmmakers can "dominate the technology to make something big and beautiful."

lines.say: She uses AI for "small helpful things" like pre-visualization and storyboarding.
lines.show: She uses AI for "small helpful things" like pre-visualization and storyboarding.

lines.say: This debate shapes the future of creative control in Hollywood.
lines.show: This debate shapes the future of creative control in Hollywood.

lines.say: Full story at The Screen Report — link in bio.
lines.show: Full story at The Screen Report — link in bio.

onScreenTitle: JODIE FOSTER ON AI IN FILMS

captions.instagram: Jodie Foster reveals her surprising take on AI's current role in Hollywood filmmaking, citing a major Brad Pitt movie as an example. She believes AI is already shaping blockbusters, but artists can still maintain control. #JodieFoster #AI #Hollywood #Filmmaking #BradPitt #F1Movie #ScreenReport #TechInFilm #CreativeControl #EntertainmentNews #MovieIndustry #FutureOfFilm
captions.facebook: Jodie Foster says AI is already influencing major Hollywood films, including Brad Pitt's 'F1.' What do you think about AI's role in the creative process?

pinterest.title: Jodie Foster: AI Already Making Hollywood Films Like Brad Pitt's 'F1'
pinterest.description: Oscar-winner Jodie Foster shares her perspective on artificial intelligence in filmmaking, revealing she believes AI is already impacting major productions like the Brad Pitt racing drama 'F1.' She discusses how filmmakers can dominate the technology for creative control. Stay updated on the latest Hollywood tech news!

youtube.title: Jodie Foster: AI is ALREADY Making Hollywood Films Like Brad Pitt's 'F1' #Shorts
youtube.description: Jodie Foster shares her insights on AI's current influence in Hollywood, pointing to a major Brad Pitt film as evidence.

captions.x: Jodie Foster reveals AI is ALREADY making major Hollywood films, citing Brad Pitt's 'F1' as an example. She believes artists can still dominate the tech. #JodieFoster #AI

spoken: Jodie Foster says AI is ALREADY making major Hollywood films. The Oscar winner points to the Brad Pitt racing drama 'F1' as an example. She describes its structure as "exactly what you'd learn in school." Actors deliver lines "exactly the way it would be written if a computer was writing." Foster says filmmakers can "dominate the technology to make something big and beautiful." She uses AI for "small helpful things" like pre-visualization and storyboarding. This debate shapes the future of creative control in Hollywood. Full story at The Screen Report — link in bio.
